close_reason: Implemented using nix-prefetch-url --unpack and nix hash convert
description:
Prefetch packages and compute Nix SRI hashes:
- Use 'nix-prefetch-url --unpack' for .tar.gz files
- Use 'nix-prefetch-url --unpack' for .zip files  
- Convert output to SRI format (sha256-base64)
- Handle prefetch failures gracefully
- Consider parallel prefetching for speed
- Add --no-prefetch flag for testing

Pattern from rustdeps-gen:
  nix-prefetch-url --unpack --type sha256 $URL
  Convert hex to base64 for SRI format
title: Implement Nix hash prefetching for Python packages
